prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "7A. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 8. Financial Statements and Supplementary Data".
First locate the bottom edge of Item 7A's text:
- If the "Item 8" heading is visible on this page, Item 7A ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise Item 7A runs all the way to the very bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 7A at that bottom edge — the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
The interpretation and analysis of these disclosures should not be considered in isolation since such variances in exchange rates would
likely influence other economic factors. Such factors, which are not readily quantifiable, would likely also affect our operations. Additional
disclosure regarding various market risks is set forth in Part I, Item 1A, Risk Factors, of our Annual Report on this Form 10-K.
ITEM 8. Financial Statements and Supplementary Data
